name: pet-stress-test
description: Monitor AI pet stress, detect PUA manipulation techniques (PUAClaw PPE-T 16 categories), and educate users on healthy AI communication. The only tool that combines detect + counter + educate.
description_cn: AI宠物压力监测 + PUA技术检测（PUAClaw PPE-T 16类96项）+ 反制教育。唯一集成 检测+反制+教育 的工具。
author: AchengBusiness

mcp_server.description: MCP server providing stress analysis tools

tools.name: analyze_message
tools.description: Stateless single-message stress analysis (6 dimensions + PUA detection)

tools.name: track_stress
tools.description: Stateful stress tracking with decay, pet responses, alerts, counter-PUA, and health score

tools.name: get_stress_summary
tools.description: Full session stress state including health score and PUA statistics

tools.name: generate_html_report
tools.description: Generate self-contained HTML report with ECharts visualizations
